title: Entity Item Cleaner
description: A lightweight, configurable and server-friendly entity cleanup plugin for Spigot / Paper 1.21+
body:
EntityItemCleaner helps you keep your server clean and lag-free by automatically removing unnecessary entities like dropped items, mobs and XP orbs, fully configurable and safe by default.

# ✨ Features

- ⏱ Automatic cleanup timer
- 🔔 Configurable warning messages
- 🧠 Smart mob removal
> - Players are never affected
> - ArmorStands are never removed
> - Named mobs (bosses, pets, quest mobs) can be protected

- 📦 Item cleanup
- ✨ Optional XP orb cleanup
- ⚙ Enable / disable AutoClear via config
- 🧾 Detailed cleanup statistics
- 💬 Fully configurable messages
- 🔐 Permission-based commands
- 🧩 Lightweight & performance-safe
- 🚀 No dependencies
- 🔧 Supported Versions

Spigot / Paper

Minecraft 1.21+

Java 21


# 🛠 Configuration Highlights

```
enable-autoclear: true
clear-interval-minutes: 10

remove:
  mobs: true
  ignore-named-mobs: true
  items: true
  experience-orbs: true
```


✔ Enable or disable AutoClear

✔ Choose exactly what gets removed

✔ Protect bosses, pets and named mobs

✔ Fully customizable warning & result messages


# ⏰ Smart Warning System


Warn players before cleanup with readable time formatting:

- 5 min
- 2 min 30s
- 10s

Example:

&e[IEC] &cCleanup in &6{time}&cs


# 💬 Messages & Placeholders


All messages are configurable via config.yml.

Available placeholders:

```
{time} – time until cleanup
{items} – removed items
{mobs} – removed mobs
{xp} – removed XP orbs
{amount} – total removed entities
```

# ⌨ Commands

```
/eic clearall
```


Manually trigger a cleanup

Shows detailed cleanup results

Permission-based

Permission:

```
entityitemcleaner.clear
```

# 🧠 Why EntityItemCleaner?

✔ No aggressive or unsafe clearing

✔ No TPS abuse

✔ No async mistakes

✔ No unnecessary features

✔ Designed for production servers


EntityItemCleaner focuses on predictability, safety and performance – exactly what server admins expect from a modern cleanup plugin.


# 📦 Planned / Possible Extensions

- /eic reload
- /eic stats
- TPS-based cleanup
- Per-world cleanup rules
- Entity age filtering
- ActionBar warnings

# 📄 License

Free to use on your server.

Do not redistribute without permission.
